scripts.lint:congress-scanner: eslint next.config.ts playwright.config.ts app/congress-scanner components/congress-scanner lib/congress-scanner tests/e2e
scripts.congress:dev: echo "Terminal A: npm run db:d1:migrate && npm run db:d1:seed && npm run worker:dev" && echo "Terminal B: export NEXT_PUBLIC_CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787 && export CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787 && npm run dev -- --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3100" && echo "Then run: npm run test:api-contract && npm run congress:worker:smoke && npm run test:e2e:smoke"
scripts.smoke: npm run lint:congress-scanner && npm run test && npm run test:api-contract && npm run test:e2e:smoke
scripts.smoke:local: echo "Terminal A: npm run db:d1:migrate && npm run db:d1:seed && npm run worker:dev" && echo "Terminal B env: export CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787 && export NEXT_PUBLIC_CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787" && CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787 NEXT_PUBLIC_CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787 npm run lint:congress-scanner && CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787 NEXT_PUBLIC_CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787 npm run test:api-contract && CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787 NEXT_PUBLIC_CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787 npm run congress:worker:smoke && CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787 NEXT_PUBLIC_CONGRESS_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:8787 npm run test:e2e:smoke
scripts.smoke:static: echo "Terminal A: cd /Users/vengels/ticri-nextjs/services/congress-worker && cp .dev.vars.example .dev.vars && npm run dev" && echo "Terminal B: export CONGRESS_API_BASE=${CONGRESS_API_BASE:-http://127.0.0.1:8787}" && CONGRESS_API_BASE=${CONGRESS_API_BASE:-http://127.0.0.1:8787} npm run lint:congress-scanner && CONGRESS_API_BASE=${CONGRESS_API_BASE:-http://127.0.0.1:8787} npm run test && CONGRESS_API_BASE=${CONGRESS_API_BASE:-http://127.0.0.1:8787} npm run test:api-contract && CONGRESS_API_BASE=${CONGRESS_API_BASE:-http://127.0.0.1:8787} npm run test:e2e:smoke
